3141010.name: Flashlight Simulator
3141010.description:
Welcome to the one and the only flashlight simulator that is guaranteed to take care of all your needs in one life. Unfortunately, this game still seems to be in development, but I was able to scrape together all the existing code into something that's somewhat playable, enjoy!

Apparently, this was planned after flashlight sim but never came to fruition. Flashlight sim was supposed to be an innate test whereas this game would supposedly immerse you completely, this time having no escape.
3141010.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
